data.title: This JD.com Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Monday
Meta, Palo Alto And A Financial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
data.description: Analysts discuss Palo Alto, Meta Platforms and Truist Financial on the latest edition of CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades."

data.title: Hyundai's Boston Dynamics Partners With Toyota Research Institute To Challenge Tesla's Optimus Humanoid Robot
data.description: Robotics company Boston Dynamics and Toyota Research Institute (TRI) entered into a research partnership last week, in a bid to replicate Tesla Inc's progress with its Optimus humanoid robot.

data.title: Alibaba Uses AI Tool Quanzhantui To Boosts Singles' Day Sales, Driving Growth for Merchants
data.description: Alibaba launched Quanzhantui to boost revenue on Taobao and Tmall platforms. The tool helps merchants with AI-powered tech and supported 1.3M products on Singles' Day.

data.title: Amid Tussle With Southwest Airlines, Activist Investor Elliot Launches Podcast To Influence Shareholders
data.description: While settlement discussions are ongoing, the future of the podcast remains uncertain.
